title: PAFB Pack
description: PAFB (PvP and FPS Boost) is an optimization pack that reduces lag, boosts FPS, and delivers a smoother PvP experience.
body:
PAFB (PvP and FPS Boost)

PAFB is a Minecraft optimization pack made for players who want their PvP to feel smooth, fast, and responsive.

What it includes: A hand-picked set of performance-focused mods that keep the game stable and efficient.

Features: Higher FPS, less lag and a lightweight setup without all the unnecessary extras.

Why try it: With PAFB, every duel and PvP battle feels smoother and more consistent, so you can focus on the fight instead of struggling with performance issues.

Whether you’re training, dueling friends, or playing on competitive servers, PAFB helps you get the most out of your game.
